identity.name: The Princess Who Slept Badly
identity.story: Proved her blood by feeling a pea through twenty mattresses. Never slept easy again and never once asked for the trade back — the smallest wrongness in a room still wakes her before anyone else has noticed it's there.

relationships.kind: the first neighbor who feels him crossing a room and says so before he has to announce the corner

child.label: resettling a pillow that was never actually wrong
hearing him before he says a word

children.label: crossing to the hedge where he does his surveying
naming the corner he's about to announce, half a breath early

child.label: counting mattresses that aren't there anymore
awake under nine blankets, guessing at a tenth
